commit.subject: LU-9978 kernel: kernel update RHEL7.4 [3.10.0-693.2.2.el7]
commit.message:
LU-9978 kernel: kernel update RHEL7.4 [3.10.0-693.2.2.el7]

update RHEL 7.4 kernel to 3.10.0-693.2.2.el7
